name: 中美互联网企业家候选池
description: 收拢中美互联网创业史上那些彼此气味完全不同、却都改写过平台规则的人物：有人靠审美统治，有人靠算法分发，有人靠战争式执行，也有人把公司磨成一台近乎无情的机器。 文案已强化为更有时代气、江湖感和创业策略感的展示版本。

records.name: Jack Ma
records.quote_en: Today is hard, tomorrow will be worse, but the day after tomorrow will be sunshine.
records.quote_zh: 今天很残酷，明天更残酷，后天很美好。
records.core_traits: 愿景叙事、商业直觉、组织鼓动、全球化野心
records.thinking_style: 看他做事，会发现他总先把空气吹热，再让组织跟上温度。细节未必是他的迷恋，但气候和方向必须先被他说出来。
records.temperament_tags: 舞台感强、外放、商业浪潮感、极强鼓动性
records.temperament_summary: 像一个最早把中国互联网江湖讲成大时代的人，话一出口，生意场的风向都像要跟着转。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：看他做事，会发现他总先把空气吹热，再让组织跟上温度。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入马云的「舞台感强」频率，让「外放」与「商业浪潮感」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Jack Ma's stage presence signal, aligning outward, market-wave instinct, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，阿里巴巴集团创始人之一，是中国互联网草莽年代里最会“起势”的人物之一。他把小商家、支付、物流和全球化想象卷进同一场大潮，最后连时代叙事都成了他的工具。在这个人物池里，马云代表的是「舞台感强、外放、商业浪潮感」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and co-founder of Alibaba, and one of the first builders to turn commerce into a story about an era. He did not just assemble a platform; he created the climate in which countless small merchants could find their place in the same rising tide. In this pool, Jack Ma represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 舞台感强, 外放, 商业浪潮感: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 创立阿里巴巴集团
推动淘宝与天猫成形
帮助搭建中国互联网电商基础设施
achievements_en: Co-founded Alibaba Group
Built Taobao and Tmall into dominant platforms
Helped shape the infrastructure of China's internet commerce
records.core_traits_en: visionary storytelling, commercial instinct, organizational mobilization, global ambition
records.temperament_tags_en: stage presence, outward, market-wave instinct, mobilizing force
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through visionary storytelling, commercial instinct, organizational mobilization, global ambition, with a working style marked by stage presence, outward, market-wave instinct, mobilizing force.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Jack Ma channels stage presence, outward, market-wave instinct, mobilizing force: a distinctive presence shaped by visionary storytelling, commercial instinct, organizational mobilization, global ambition.

records.name: Pony Ma
records.quote_en: The internet is ultimately about reducing distance and friction between people.
records.quote_zh: 互联网的本质，是不断消除人与人之间的距离和摩擦。
records.core_traits: 产品克制、工程稳健、生态统筹、长期扩张
records.thinking_style: 他不像在正面冲锋，更像在暗处铺线。很多关键能力不是突然爆出来的，而是被他慢慢接成一张让人难以绕开的网。
records.temperament_tags: 低调、工程派、克制、生态型
records.temperament_summary: 像一个珠江边安静下棋的人，不高声，但棋盘越铺越大，最后半个江湖都在他的局里。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他不像在正面冲锋，更像在暗处铺线。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入马化腾的「低调」频率，让「工程派」与「克制」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Pony Ma's low-key signal, aligning engineering-minded, restrained, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，腾讯主要创始人之一，是中国互联网从即时通讯走向超级生态的关键人物。他不像最会喊话的那一个，却常常是最后把关系链、流量口和支付水路都接到自己这边的人。在这个人物池里，马化腾代表的是「低调、工程派、克制」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and principal co-founder of Tencent, and the sort of builder who rarely claims center stage yet keeps placing decisive pieces deep inside the system. From social to payments, from gaming to content, he slowly turned entry points into an ecosystem. In this pool, Pony Ma represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 低调, 工程派, 克制: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 共同创立腾讯
推动 QQ 与微信生态扩张
参与构建中国互联网支付与内容基础设施
achievements_en: Co-founded Tencent
Expanded the QQ and WeChat ecosystems
Helped build China's payment and content infrastructure
records.core_traits_en: product restraint, engineering steadiness, ecosystem orchestration, long-term expansion
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through product restraint, engineering steadiness, ecosystem orchestration, long-term expansion, with a working style marked by low-key, engineering-minded, restrained, ecosystem-oriented.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Pony Ma channels low-key, engineering-minded, restrained, ecosystem-oriented: a distinctive presence shaped by product restraint, engineering steadiness, ecosystem orchestration, long-term expansion.

records.name: Zhang Yiming
records.quote_en: The right information should find the right person at the right time.
records.quote_zh: 好的信息，应该在对的时间送到对的人手里。
records.core_traits: 算法分发、冷静抽象、全球产品感、效率优先
records.thinking_style: 他对“内容好不好”并不沉迷，真正让他兴奋的是分发规则能不能被重写。仿佛只要注意力路径变了，整个行业就会跟着改朝换代。
records.temperament_tags: 冷静、抽象、系统控、全球视野
records.temperament_summary: 像一个新一代流量秩序的改朝换代者，不靠江湖姿态，靠的是机器重新分封注意力。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他对“内容好不好”并不沉迷，真正让他兴奋的是分发规则能不能被重写。

records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Zhang Yiming's calm signal, aligning abstract, systems-driven, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，字节跳动创始人，是移动互联网下半场最能改写分发规则的人之一。他接过的不是门户时代的话语权，而是算法时代的闸门，于是内容江湖的牌桌也被重新洗了一遍。在这个人物池里，张一鸣代表的是「冷静、抽象、系统控」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and founder of ByteDance, and one of the clearest rewriters of distribution rules in the modern internet era. He was less interested in judging content than in trusting machines to reorder attention, and the industry’s power boundaries moved with that bet. In this pool, Zhang Yiming represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 冷静, 抽象, 系统控: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 创立字节跳动
推出今日头条与抖音体系
推动 TikTok 成为全球级产品
achievements_en: Founded ByteDance
Built Toutiao and Douyin into major platforms

records.core_traits_en: algorithmic distribution, cool abstraction, global product sense, efficiency-first
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through algorithmic distribution, cool abstraction, global product sense, efficiency-first, with a working style marked by calm, abstract, systems-driven, global perspective.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Zhang Yiming channels calm, abstract, systems-driven, global perspective: a distinctive presence shaped by algorithmic distribution, cool abstraction, global product sense, efficiency-first.

records.name: Colin Huang
records.quote_en: Real innovation often begins by rethinking efficiency from the bottom up.
records.quote_zh: 真正的创新，往往从重新理解效率开始。
records.core_traits: 系统效率、低价机制、博弈设计、组织抽象
records.thinking_style: 他身上有种近乎冷感的机制痴迷。别人谈品牌、谈调性，他更像在盯着一台机器的参数，看哪里还能再压低一点成本、再抬高一点效率。
records.temperament_tags: 克制、算账能力强、系统派、反传统
records.temperament_summary: 像一个不爱抛头露面、却能在后台把整张生意账算到变天的人。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他身上有种近乎冷感的机制痴迷。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入黄峥的「克制」频率，让「算账能力强」与「系统派」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Colin Huang's restrained signal, aligning sharp commercial arithmetic, systems-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，拼多多创始人，是中国电商红海里最像“后厨高手”的人物之一。他不和你争台前风头，却会悄悄改掉价格、供给和人性的算法，最后把大盘都带偏。在这个人物池里，黄峥代表的是「克制、算账能力强、系统派」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and founder of Pinduoduo, and one of the founders who feels most like a designer of mechanisms. He did not win by being loud, but by quietly rewriting price, supply, and incentives until the old order cracked open before others fully noticed. In this pool, Colin Huang represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 克制, 算账能力强, 系统派: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 创立拼多多
推动社交电商大规模普及
重塑低价供应链与农产品上行体系
achievements_en: Founded Pinduoduo

records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Colin Huang channels restrained, sharp commercial arithmetic, systems-minded, unconventional: a distinctive presence shaped by system efficiency, low-price mechanism design, game design, organizational abstraction.

records.name: Robin Li
records.quote_en: Technology changes the world by changing how people get information.
records.quote_zh: 技术改变世界，往往先从改变人们获取信息的方式开始。

records.thinking_style: 他往往先从底层技术看问题，像在掂量一个入口背后的引擎够不够稳。市场情绪会来会走，但他更像在等下一层技术地基真正长出来。
records.temperament_tags: 技术派、稳、长期下注、理性
records.temperament_summary: 像一个在中文互联网旧王朝里守过城、也在 AI 新战场上继续埋桩的人。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他往往先从底层技术看问题，像在掂量一个入口背后的引擎够不够稳。

records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Robin Li's technical signal, aligning steady, long-term bettor, and the noise of the market...

records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and co-founder of Baidu, indispensable to both the Chinese search era and the country’s long arc of AI investment. He carries an engineer’s patience: build the technical floor thick enough first, then wait for the next entry point to reveal itself. In this pool, Robin Li represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 技术派, 稳, 长期下注: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.temperament_summary: 像个永远不肯把刀收回鞘里的人，哪怕一桌人都坐下了，他也得先看看谁会先动手。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他看世界明显带着攻防视角，很多问题到了他那里都会被翻译成“入口能不能抢、对手能不能压”。

records.thinking_style: 他更像在平衡，而不是在表演。很多人迷恋热度本身，他看起来更在意的是平台能不能撑过热度退潮之后的日子。
records.temperament_tags: 稳、经营型、媒体脑、低调
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总在风浪边上扶船的人，不抢高光，但很少让船真翻。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他更像在平衡，而不是在表演。

records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，新浪与微博体系的重要掌舵者之一，是门户向社交媒体转身过程中的关键经营者。江湖上最热的往往不是他本人，但很多最难熬的周期，偏偏要靠他这种人撑过去。在这个人物池里，曹国伟代表的是「稳、经营型、媒体脑」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and key leader within Sina and Weibo, and an archetypal operator in the shift from portals to social media. His talent lies not in manufacturing myth, but in keeping an always-unsteady platform turning through its cycles. In this pool, Charles Chao represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 稳, 经营型, 媒体脑: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Gong Yu
records.quote_en: Long-form content platforms are won through patience, catalog depth, and operating discipline.
records.quote_zh: 长视频平台的胜负，很多时候是耐心、片库和运营纪律的胜负。
records.core_traits: 长视频经营、内容耐心、平台纪律、版权意识
records.thinking_style: 他看内容平台很少浪漫，更多时候像在看一本沉重的经营账。片库、版权、会员、成本，都是必须同时扛住的重量。
records.temperament_tags: 耐心、经营派、内容平台、克制
records.temperament_summary: 像个内容生意里的老掌柜，知道热闹能带客，也知道账本才决定店能开多久。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他看内容平台很少浪漫，更多时候像在看一本沉重的经营账。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入龚宇的「耐心」频率，让「经营派」与「内容平台」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Gong Yu's restrained signal, aligning pattern, signal, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，爱奇艺创始人之一，是长视频大战里最典型的内容经营派人物。流量可以起伏，爆款可以轮换，但片库、版权和会员这几本账，他得一页页亲自算清。在这个人物池里，龚宇代表的是「耐心、经营派、内容平台」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and founder of iQIYI, and one of the figures in Chinese long-video most recognizably shaped like a content operator. His long struggle has been with a business that is expensive and slow: how to keep catalog, rights, and membership economics holding up the same platform at once. In this pool, Gong Yu represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 耐心, 经营派, 内容平台: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

推动中国长视频会员模式成熟
长期经营版权与内容平台体系
achievements_en: Founded iQIYI
Helped mature subscription video in China
Built a long-form platform around rights and content operations

records.name: Victor Koo
records.quote_en: Video changes the internet when culture becomes native to the platform itself.
records.quote_zh: 当文化内容本身变成平台语言，视频才真正改变互联网。
records.core_traits: 视频先锋、文化平台感、早期冒险、内容想象
records.thinking_style: 他身上有很早一代视频互联网创业者的理想主义，像比市场更早相信影像会吞掉越来越多的时间。很多判断里都带着“先做出来再说”的浪漫。
records.temperament_tags: 先锋、内容感强、冒险、早期互联网浪漫
records.temperament_summary: 像中国视频互联网最早一批追梦的人，身上一直带着点“先拍了再说”的浪漫。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他身上有很早一代视频互联网创业者的理想主义，像比市场更早相信影像会吞掉越来越多的时间。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入古永锵的「先锋」频率，让「内容感强」与「冒险」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Victor Koo's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，优酷创始人之一，是在线视频最早的旗帜性创业者之一。在土豆和优酷还在抢跑的年代，他已经认定视频会吃掉越来越多的互联网时间和文化注意力。在这个人物池里，古永锵代表的是「先锋、内容感强、冒险」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and founder of Youku, and one of the earliest banner founders in Chinese online video. His importance lies not only in arriving early, but in believing sooner than most that video would eventually swallow a large share of internet time. In this pool, Victor Koo represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 先锋, 内容感强, 冒险: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

推动中国在线视频平台成形
参与塑造视频内容消费习惯
achievements_en: Founded Youku
Helped form China's online video platform market
Shaped habits around internet video consumption

records.name: Yao Jinbo
records.quote_en: Large marketplace businesses are built on tiny, repeated moments of trust.
records.quote_zh: 大平台很多时候是靠无数细小的信任交易堆出来的。
records.core_traits: 信息撮合、下沉市场、分类信息、交易信任
records.thinking_style: 他对现实生活里的碎需求很有耐心，像能从别人嫌麻烦的地方看出平台价值。生意不一定优雅，但只要足够真实，就值得被组织。
records.temperament_tags: 务实、下沉、撮合型、交易感
records.temperament_summary: 像一个肯蹲在生活细处捡金子的人，越是琐碎，越觉得里面藏着平台生意。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他对现实生活里的碎需求很有耐心，像能从别人嫌麻烦的地方看出平台价值。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入姚劲波的「务实」频率，让「下沉」与「撮合型」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Yao Jinbo's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，58 同城创始人之一，是分类信息和本地撮合平台最典型的创业者之一。租房、招聘、转让、家政，这些不够体面的需求，最后都能在他手里长成一门大生意。在这个人物池里，姚劲波代表的是「务实、下沉、撮合型」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and founder of 58.com, and a classic builder in classifieds and local matching. His gift is not making a business sound lofty, but organizing the most mundane, realistic, and troublesome needs into scale. In this pool, Yao Jinbo represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 务实, 下沉, 撮合型: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 创立 58 同城
推动分类信息平台化
深耕本地生活与招聘租房撮合
achievements_en: Founded 58.com
Scaled online classifieds into a platform model
Focused on local services, jobs, and housing transactions

records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Yao Jinbo channels strategic, market-aware, operator-minded: a distinctive presence shaped by market instinct, product judgment, operating style.

records.name: Li Xiang
records.quote_en: A product earns conviction only when it solves a real family-level problem.
records.quote_zh: 产品值不值得做，最终要看它能不能解决真实家庭的问题。
records.core_traits: 产品偏执、直白表达、用户问题导向、长期修正
records.thinking_style: 他像那种会不断把判断拖回真实用户问题里的人，甚至带点自我拷打的意味。观点可以翻修，但产品不能糊弄。
records.temperament_tags: 直白、产品狂热、问题导向、持续修正
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把产品复盘当家常便饭的人，嘴很直，刀也很快，但始终是冲着问题去。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他像那种会不断把判断拖回真实用户问题里的人，甚至带点自我拷打的意味。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入李想的「直白」频率，让「产品狂热」与「问题导向」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Li Xiang's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，汽车之家与理想汽车创始人之一，是中国互联网创业者里极少见的高密度公开复盘型产品人。他一路从论坛、媒体走到智能汽车，身上的互联网产品脾气始终没变。在这个人物池里，李想代表的是「直白、产品狂热、问题导向」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur behind Autohome and Li Auto, and a rare founder who publicly revises his product thinking at high frequency. He does not fear changing his judgment; what he fears is product self-deception, which is why he keeps pressing every question back toward the real user. In this pool, Li Xiang represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 直白, 产品狂热, 问题导向: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 创立汽车之家
创立理想汽车
形成强烈的用户问题导向产品方法
achievements_en: Founded Autohome
Founded Li Auto
Built a strong user-problem-oriented product methodology

records.name: He Xiaopeng
records.quote_en: Software changes products most when hardware is finally willing to listen.
records.quote_zh: 当硬件开始真正听软件的话，产品的边界就会被改写。
records.core_traits: 工程乐观、软件定义、产品升级、技术创业连续性
records.thinking_style: 他总在把互联网产品脑往更重的产业里迁移，像不太相信硬件能永远保持旧性格。只要软件足够强，机器迟早会学会换脾气。
records.temperament_tags: 技术乐观、产品脑、连续创业、升级派
records.temperament_summary: 像一个从移动互联网闯出来、又不甘心只留在屏幕里的人。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他总在把互联网产品脑往更重的产业里迁移，像不太相信硬件能永远保持旧性格。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入何小鹏的「技术乐观」频率，让「产品脑」与「连续创业」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into He Xiaopeng's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，UC 体系重要人物之一，也是小鹏汽车创始人之一，代表了那代互联网产品人向更重工业世界外溢的路径。从浏览器到智能车机，他始终在押软件会重新定义硬件。在这个人物池里，何小鹏代表的是「技术乐观、产品脑、连续创业」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur once central to UC and later founder of XPeng, representing a clear path from internet product building into heavier industry. He has consistently believed that software will, sooner or later, rewrite the temperament of hardware. In this pool, He Xiaopeng represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 技术乐观, 产品脑, 连续创业: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Yu Yongfu
records.quote_en: Traffic only matters if you know how to turn it into durable user behavior.
records.quote_zh: 流量有没有价值，要看你能不能把它变成长期行为。
records.core_traits: 流量经营、移动入口、平台扩张、组织转场
records.thinking_style: 他对入口变化很敏感，像总在空气里闻下一个流量关口的味道。产品只是表层，关键是你有没有先站住路口。
records.temperament_tags: 流量脑、移动时代、转场能力、平台型
records.temperament_summary: 像个专盯路口的人，风往哪吹不一定准，但流量往哪过，他常常先闻见。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他对入口变化很敏感，像总在空气里闻下一个流量关口的味道。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入俞永福的「流量脑」频率，让「移动时代」与「转场能力」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Yu Yongfu's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，UC 浏览器核心创始人之一，也是阿里移动业务的重要人物之一，是移动互联网入口争夺战里的关键角色。在浏览器、分发和本地生活之间，他一直围着“谁站住路口”这件事打转。在这个人物池里，俞永福代表的是「流量脑、移动时代、转场能力」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur central to UC Browser and later to Alibaba’s mobile strategy, and a key figure in China’s struggle over mobile internet entry points. His sharpest instinct is a nose for where the next traffic choke point is beginning to form. In this pool, Yu Yongfu represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 流量脑, 移动时代, 转场能力: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Fu Sheng
records.quote_en: Tools become strategic when they solve fear first and convenience second.
records.quote_zh: 工具产品真正有战略价值，是它先解决恐惧，再解决便利。
records.core_traits: 安全工具、移动出海、速度感、竞争意识
records.thinking_style: 他很擅长从焦虑里找入口，像知道用户最急、最怕、最需要省事的地方在哪里。工具在他手里，常常先解决不安，再解决效率。
records.temperament_tags: 快、工具派、竞争性强、出海意识
records.temperament_summary: 像一个知道工具产品也能打硬仗的人，先抓痛点，再一路把刀磨快。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他很擅长从焦虑里找入口，像知道用户最急、最怕、最需要省事的地方在哪里。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入傅盛的「快」频率，让「工具派」与「竞争性强」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Fu Sheng's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...

records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur central to Cheetah Mobile and a representative figure in mobile tools, security products, and the globalization wave. He is especially skilled at forging the most immediate anxieties into an entry point frequent enough to scale. In this pool, Fu Sheng represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 快, 工具派, 竞争性强: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Chen Ou
records.quote_en: Branding only works when it can carry performance, not just attention.
records.quote_zh: 品牌只有能承接成交时，注意力才真正值钱。
records.core_traits: 品牌前台、营销能力、消费互联网、曝光感
records.thinking_style: 他对前台叙事有天然感觉，知道注意力如果不尽快转成成交就会蒸发。于是创始人、品牌和流量，经常被他绑成同一个镜头。
records.temperament_tags: 前台感强、营销型、曝光度高、消费互联网
records.temperament_summary: 像把自己也一起推上柜台的人，货、品牌和老板的脸，最好同时被看见。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他对前台叙事有天然感觉，知道注意力如果不尽快转成成交就会蒸发。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入陈欧的「前台感强」频率，让「营销型」与「曝光度高」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Chen Ou's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，聚美优品创始人之一，是消费互联网时代“创始人即品牌”的鲜明样本之一。在那个广告词能一夜刷屏的年代，他很懂怎么把自己也变成生意的一部分。在这个人物池里，陈欧代表的是「前台感强、营销型、曝光度高」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and founder of Jumei, and one of the clearest examples of the founder-as-brand model in the consumer internet era. By pushing himself to the front of the stage, he bound brand, traffic, and conversion to the same face. In this pool, Chen Ou represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 前台感强, 营销型, 曝光度高: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Li Guoqing
records.quote_en: Retail on the internet still rises or falls on whether people trust your choices.
records.quote_zh: 互联网零售归根到底，还是看用户信不信你的选择。
records.core_traits: 图书电商、公开表达、争议感、零售判断
records.thinking_style: 他似乎很难把商业判断和公开表达分开处理，像做零售也顺手在打嘴仗。存在感、观点和生意，常常同时往外冒。
records.temperament_tags: 争议、直给、零售脑、表达欲强
records.temperament_summary: 像个永远舍不得退场的老江湖，生意做着，嘴仗也不能落下。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他似乎很难把商业判断和公开表达分开处理，像做零售也顺手在打嘴仗。

What is distinctive about him is how business judgment and public expression almost always arrive together, rarely separating into different personas. In this pool, Li Guoqing represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 争议, 直给, 零售脑: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Wang Wei
records.quote_en: The internet becomes culturally alive when users stop consuming and start creating identity around media.
records.quote_zh: 当用户开始围绕内容建立身份认同，互联网才真正有了文化生命。
records.core_traits: 视频理想主义、文化感、创作气质、早期冒险
records.thinking_style: 他更像在想一种媒介生活，而不只是一个流量平台。视频在他那里不仅是内容形式，更像一种会重写互联网气质的文化语言。
records.temperament_tags: 文艺、先锋、内容理想主义、冒险
records.temperament_summary: 像一个更想给一代网民留下一种文化气味的人，不只是想把流量生意做大。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他更像在想一种媒介生活，而不只是一个流量平台。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入王微的「文艺」频率，让「先锋」与「内容理想主义」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Wang Wei's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 中国企业家，土豆网创始人之一，是在线视频最早的标志性人物之一。那是个视频刚开始长出文化影响力的年代，而他更像在试着给中国互联网留下一个更文艺、更视频化的侧面。在这个人物池里，王微代表的是「文艺、先锋、内容理想主义」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese entrepreneur and founder of Tudou, and one of the earliest symbolic figures in Chinese online video. His weight lies less in commercial ruthlessness than in a strong idealism about video culture; he was never trying to build only a traffic business. In this pool, Wang Wei represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 文艺, 先锋, 内容理想主义: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Steve Jobs
records.quote_en: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
records.quote_zh: 创新决定了你是领袖，还是跟随者。
records.core_traits: 产品直觉、审美控制、叙事力、极致标准
records.thinking_style: 他看产品像看一件必须被雕到不能再雕的器物。功能只是起点，真正让他在意的是体验有没有逼近某种近乎命令式的美感。
records.temperament_tags: 强控制、审美型、戏剧感、产品极致
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把产品做成审美命题、再把审美做成商业统治力的人。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他看产品像看一件必须被雕到不能再雕的器物。

records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，苹果公司联合创始人之一，是现代消费科技史上最能塑形的人物之一。他不只是造产品，更像在反复训练世界重新学习什么叫“好的东西”。在这个人物池里，史蒂夫·乔布斯代表的是「强控制、审美型、戏剧感」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and co-founder of Apple, and one of the most shape-defining figures in the history of consumer technology. He did not merely build products; he kept training the world to relearn what “good” could feel like. In this pool, Steve Jobs represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 强控制, 审美型, 戏剧感: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Bill Gates
records.quote_en: Success is a lousy teacher. It seduces smart people into thinking they can’t lose.
records.quote_zh: 成功是个糟糕的老师，它会让聪明人误以为自己不会失败。
records.core_traits: 软件平台、战略判断、竞争纪律、长期布局
records.thinking_style: 他看世界很容易自动切到平台层和标准层，仿佛单个产品从来不值得单独讨论。重要的是谁控制接口，谁定义秩序。
records.temperament_tags: 强理性、平台派、竞争纪律、长期主义
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总在更高一层看产业格局的人，强理性、强纪律，也极少天真。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他看世界很容易自动切到平台层和标准层，仿佛单个产品从来不值得单独讨论。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入比尔·盖茨的「强理性」频率，让「平台派」与「竞争纪律」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Bill Gates' strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，微软联合创始人之一，是 PC 软件平台时代最强势的统治者之一。他真正厉害的地方，不只是写软件，而是把标准、开发者和产业秩序一并握进手里。在这个人物池里，比尔·盖茨代表的是「强理性、平台派、竞争纪律」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and co-founder of Microsoft, and one of the hardest-edged rulers of the PC software era. His deeper strength was not only in software itself, but in holding standards, developers, and industrial order in the same grip. In this pool, Bill Gates represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 强理性, 平台派, 竞争纪律: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Jeff Bezos
records.quote_en: Your margin is my opportunity.
records.quote_zh: 你的利润，就是我的机会。
records.core_traits: 极致执行、系统效率、长期主义、组织机器
records.thinking_style: 他像在盯着一只必须不断转快的飞轮，很多看似分开的动作最后都会被他接回系统效率。客户体验和成本纪律，在他眼里本来就是同一件事的两面。
records.temperament_tags: 冷硬、长期主义、执行狂、系统机器
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把公司当成飞轮来设计的人，冷静、耐心，而且几乎残酷地重视效率。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他像在盯着一只必须不断转快的飞轮，很多看似分开的动作最后都会被他接回系统效率。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入杰夫·贝索斯的「冷硬」频率，让「长期主义」与「执行狂」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Jeff Bezos' strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，亚马逊创始人之一，是互联网商业里最像系统经营者的人物之一。他把客户体验、成本结构和组织纪律接成一个飞轮，最后公司本身也像机器一样开始自我增压。在这个人物池里，杰夫·贝索斯代表的是「冷硬、长期主义、执行狂」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and founder of Amazon, and one of the figures in internet business who feels most like a systems operator. He connected customer experience, cost structure, and organizational discipline into a flywheel until the company itself began to build pressure like a machine. In this pool, Jeff Bezos represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 冷硬, 长期主义, 执行狂: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.name: Larry Page
records.quote_en: Always deliver more than expected.
records.quote_zh: 永远交付超出预期的东西。
records.core_traits: 搜索工程、第一性原理、平台扩张、技术理想主义
records.thinking_style: 他身上有种技术理想主义者特有的平静，好像“把世界信息组织起来”本来就是工程问题的一部分。只要底层突破够大，平台版图就理应继续扩张。
records.temperament_tags: 技术理想主义、抽象、平台派、安静
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把技术理想主义和平台扩张天然视为同一件事的人。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他身上有种技术理想主义者特有的平静，好像“把世界信息组织起来”本来就是工程问题的一部分。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入拉里·佩奇的「技术理想主义」频率，让「抽象」与「平台派」在市场噪声中重新对齐……

records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，谷歌联合创始人之一，是把搜索工程一路推成全球平台霸权的关键人物。他身上同时有研究者的抽象和平台扩张者的雄心。在这个人物池里，拉里·佩奇代表的是「技术理想主义、抽象、平台派」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and co-founder of Google, pivotal in pushing search engineering into global platform dominance. He combines a researcher’s abstraction with the ambition of a platform expansionist. In this pool, Larry Page represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 技术理想主义, 抽象, 平台派: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.quote_en: We want Google to be the third half of your brain.
records.quote_zh: 我们希望 Google 成为你大脑的另外半边。

His importance lies in repeatedly nudging the company’s gaze a little farther beyond search. In this pool, Sergey Brin represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 实验派, 技术浪漫, 好奇心重: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

records.quote_zh: 最大的风险，就是不冒任何风险。

records.quote_zh: 当一件事足够重要时，即使胜算不大，你也会去做。

records.name: Sam Altman
records.quote_en: The price of inaction is far greater than the cost of a mistake.
records.quote_zh: 不行动的代价，通常远大于犯错的代价。
records.core_traits: AI叙事、资本网络、平台前瞻、速度感
records.thinking_style: 他像那种特别会在窗口期之前先占位的人，看准一件技术可能变成平台，就会迅速把人、钱、算力和说法都拢过来。
records.temperament_tags: 前瞻、资源整合、叙事强、速度快
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总在平台切换前夜提前占位的人，表面平静，实则推进极快。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他像那种特别会在窗口期之前先占位的人，看准一件技术可能变成平台，就会迅速把人、钱、算力和说法都拢过来。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入萨姆·奥尔特曼的「前瞻」频率，让「资源整合」与「叙事强」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Sam Altman's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家与投资人，OpenAI 核心领导者之一，是生成式 AI 从研究议题变成平台竞赛的关键人物。他擅长的，是在窗口完全打开之前，就先把人才、资本和叙事聚到同一处。在这个人物池里，萨姆·奥尔特曼代表的是「前瞻、资源整合、叙事强」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and investor, central to OpenAI and to the shift of generative AI from research topic to platform contest. His gift is gathering talent, capital, and narrative into one place before the window is fully open. In this pool, Sam Altman represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 前瞻, 资源整合, 叙事强: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 领导 OpenAI 进入平台化阶段
推动生成式 AI 产品大众化
长期连接创业、资本与技术网络
achievements_en: Led OpenAI into a platform phase
Helped mainstream generative AI products
Long connected startup, capital, and technology networks

records.name: Reed Hastings
records.quote_en: Most entrepreneurial ideas will sound crazy, stupid and uneconomic, and then they’ll turn out to be right.
records.quote_zh: 大多数创业想法一开始听上去都很疯狂、很蠢、也不经济，后来却可能被证明是对的。
records.core_traits: 订阅模型、内容转型、管理理念、长期经营
records.thinking_style: 他看问题很像制度设计者，不太相信只靠产品口号就能完成转身。商业模式要改，组织规则也得一起换。
records.temperament_tags: 稳、制度型、转型高手、长期经营
records.temperament_summary: 像一个知道公司升级必须先改制度的人，冷静、耐心，而且非常会做长期转场。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他看问题很像制度设计者，不太相信只靠产品口号就能完成转身。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入里德·哈斯廷斯的「稳」频率，让「制度型」与「转型高手」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Reed Hastings' steady signal, aligning long-term operation, signal, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，Netflix 联合创始人之一，是内容分发模式重构最成功的创业者之一。他不只改写了一门生意，也改写了那家公司该如何被组织。在这个人物池里，里德·哈斯廷斯代表的是「稳、制度型、转型高手」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and co-founder of Netflix, and one of the most successful restructurers of content distribution. He did not only rewrite a business model; he rewrote how the company itself needed to be organized. In this pool, Reed Hastings represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 稳, 制度型, 转型高手: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 共同创立 Netflix
推动 DVD 租赁转向流媒体
建立全球订阅视频平台
achievements_en: Co-founded Netflix
Shifted the business from DVD rental to streaming
Built a global subscription video platform
records.core_traits_en: long-term operation
records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through long-term operation, with a working style marked by steady, long-term operation.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Reed Hastings channels steady, long-term operation: a distinctive presence shaped by long-term operation.

records.name: Jack Dorsey
records.quote_en: Make every detail perfect and limit the number of details to perfect.
records.quote_zh: 把每个细节都做到极致，同时尽量减少需要做到极致的细节。
records.core_traits: 极简表达、社交产品、金融接口、独特气质
records.thinking_style: 他天然偏爱最小动作和最短表达，像总想把复杂行为压缩成一个轻到几乎没有重量的界面。产品越薄，个人气味反而越浓。
records.temperament_tags: 极简、怪才、接口意识、实验性强
records.temperament_summary: 像一个既想把产品做得极简，又总带着一点异质感和个人怪癖的人。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他天然偏爱最小动作和最短表达，像总想把复杂行为压缩成一个轻到几乎没有重量的界面。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入杰克·多西的「极简」频率，让「怪才」与「接口意识」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Jack Dorsey's minimalist signal, aligning pattern, signal, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，Twitter 与 Square/Block 重要创始人之一，是互联网表达接口与支付接口两条主线上的关键人物。他的作品看起来常常很薄，却总能留下很深的文化痕迹。在这个人物池里，杰克·多西代表的是「极简、怪才、接口意识」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur central to Twitter and Square/Block, and a key figure on both the expression interface and the payments interface of the internet. His products often look thin on the surface, yet leave unusually deep cultural marks. In this pool, Jack Dorsey represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 极简, 怪才, 接口意识: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 参与创立 Twitter
共同创立 Square/Block
推动短文本社交与商户支付工具普及
achievements_en: Helped found Twitter
Co-founded Square/Block
Popularized short-form social posting and merchant payment tools

records.name: Evan Spiegel
records.quote_en: People want to express themselves in the moment rather than curate a permanent museum of identity.
records.quote_zh: 人们很多时候更想表达当下，而不是经营一座永久陈列的自我博物馆。
records.core_traits: 年轻用户洞察、产品反主流、界面创新、注意力转译
records.thinking_style: 他看年轻用户很准，知道很多表达其实是在处理距离、羞耻感和人设压力。社交在他这里不是存档，而是释放。
records.temperament_tags: 年轻感、反主流、设计敏感、产品直觉
records.temperament_summary: 像一个特别懂年轻人如何表达、又不想被永久定义的人，敏锐而带点反主流。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他看年轻用户很准，知道很多表达其实是在处理距离、羞耻感和人设压力。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入埃文·斯皮格尔的「年轻感」频率，让「反主流」与「设计敏感」在市场噪声中重新对齐……

records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，Snap 共同创始人之一，是把“轻、快、会消失”的表达方式做成主流社交语法的人之一。他抓住的从来不只是功能，而是一代人对身份压力的处理方式。在这个人物池里，埃文·斯皮格尔代表的是「年轻感、反主流、设计敏感」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and co-founder of Snap, and one of the builders who made light, fast, disappearing expression into a mainstream social grammar. What he captured was never just a feature, but a generation’s way of handling identity pressure. In this pool, Evan Spiegel represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 年轻感, 反主流, 设计敏感: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 共同创立 Snap
推动阅后即焚社交普及
把 AR 滤镜做成主流产品体验
achievements_en: Co-founded Snap
Popularized ephemeral social communication
Made AR lenses a mainstream product experience

records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Evan Spiegel channels strategic, market-aware, operator-minded: a distinctive presence shaped by market instinct, product judgment, operating style.

records.name: Brian Chesky
records.quote_en: Build something people love, and then listen obsessively to them.
records.quote_zh: 先做出人们真正喜欢的东西，然后近乎偏执地听他们反馈。
records.core_traits: 设计驱动、社区信任、品牌体验、平台温度
records.thinking_style: 他做平台像在做款待，不只想着交易顺不顺，也很在意人会不会觉得被好好对待。设计感和信任感，在他手里常常一起出现。
records.temperament_tags: 设计型、用户敏感、品牌感、社区信任
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把平台生意做得带点款待感和设计洁癖的人。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他做平台像在做款待，不只想着交易顺不顺，也很在意人会不会觉得被好好对待。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入布莱恩·切斯基的「设计型」频率，让「用户敏感」与「品牌感」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Brian Chesky's user sensitivity signal, aligning pattern, signal, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，Airbnb 联合创始人之一，是把共享住宿做出品牌气味和生活方式想象的人之一。他最特别的地方，是让平台交易看起来像被设计过的款待。在这个人物池里，布莱恩·切斯基代表的是「设计型、用户敏感、品牌感」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and co-founder of Airbnb, and one of the figures who gave shared accommodation a brand atmosphere and lifestyle imagination. His distinctive move was making platform transactions feel almost like designed hospitality. In this pool, Brian Chesky represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 设计型, 用户敏感, 品牌感: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 共同创立 Airbnb
推动共享住宿平台全球化
把设计与社区信任纳入平台核心
achievements_en: Co-founded Airbnb
Globalized the shared-accommodation platform model
Put design and community trust at the center of the product

records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Brian Chesky channels user sensitivity: a distinctive presence shaped by market instinct, product judgment, operating style.

records.name: Stewart Butterfield
records.quote_en: The future of work is not more email; it is better shared context.
records.quote_zh: 工作的未来不是更多邮件，而是更好的共享语境。
records.core_traits: 协作软件、沟通接口、产品转身、审美感
records.thinking_style: 他对工作流里的信息摩擦特别敏锐，像总能发现上下文是在哪一刻断掉的。好工具在他看来，首先应该把碎掉的语境重新缝起来。
records.temperament_tags: 协作型、审美感、工具思维、转型能力
records.temperament_summary: 像一个专门在信息混乱里打磨沟通秩序的人，机智、克制，也很会转身。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他对工作流里的信息摩擦特别敏锐，像总能发现上下文是在哪一刻断掉的。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入斯图尔特·巴特菲尔德的「协作型」频率，让「审美感」与「工具思维」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Stewart Butterfield's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，Flickr 与 Slack 重要创始人之一，是那种特别会把“副产品”重新做成主平台的人。他总能从信息混乱里，嗅到新的协作秩序。在这个人物池里，斯图尔特·巴特菲尔德代表的是「协作型、审美感、工具思维」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur behind Flickr and Slack, and one of the rare founders especially gifted at turning “side-products” into central platforms. Again and again, he has sensed a new collaborative order inside information chaos. In this pool, Stewart Butterfield represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 协作型, 审美感, 工具思维: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 共同创立 Flickr
创立 Slack
推动协作沟通软件成为主流工作基础设施
achievements_en: Helped create Flickr
Founded Slack
Made team communication software mainstream infrastructure for work

records.name: Eric Yuan
records.quote_en: Delivering happiness starts with removing friction from communication.
records.quote_zh: 让沟通更少摩擦，本身就是在传递幸福感。
records.core_traits: 沟通体验、工程执行、产品简洁、企业服务
records.thinking_style: 他明显把“顺”看得很重，只要普通人还觉得麻烦，产品就还没到位。体验在他这里不是包装，而是一种硬邦邦的竞争力。
records.temperament_tags: 温和、工程派、体验驱动、企业服务
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把复杂通信工具一路磨到足够顺手才肯停的人，温和但很有韧性。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他明显把“顺”看得很重，只要普通人还觉得麻烦，产品就还没到位。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入袁征的「温和」频率，让「工程派」与「体验驱动」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Eric Yuan's gentle signal, aligning engineering-minded, signal, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国华裔企业家，Zoom 创始人之一，是把视频会议从企业 IT 工具做成日常工作基础设施的关键人物之一。他最厉害的地方，是把复杂技术磨成普通人也愿意天天使用的顺手体验。在这个人物池里，袁征代表的是「温和、工程派、体验驱动」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: A Chinese-American entrepreneur and founder of Zoom, central to turning video conferencing from enterprise IT software into everyday work infrastructure. His signature strength is sanding complex technology into an ease that ordinary people willingly use every day. In this pool, Eric Yuan represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 温和, 工程派, 体验驱动: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 创立 Zoom
推动视频会议走向大众化
把易用性做成企业服务核心竞争力
achievements_en: Founded Zoom
Mainstreamed video conferencing
Made usability a core advantage in enterprise software

records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through market instinct, product judgment, operating style, with a working style marked by gentle, engineering-minded.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Eric Yuan channels gentle, engineering-minded: a distinctive presence shaped by market instinct, product judgment, operating style.

records.name: Travis Kalanick
records.quote_en: Super pumped.
records.quote_zh: 就是要全力推进。
records.core_traits: 战争型扩张、灰度推进、规模执念、执行凶猛
records.thinking_style: 他看市场像看战场，默认先冲进去、先占住、再处理后面的反弹。温和不是他的母语，推进才是。
records.temperament_tags: 好斗、推进凶猛、灰度、战争型
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把创业理解成持续进攻的人，冲得猛，也因此争议极大。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他看市场像看战场，默认先冲进去、先占住、再处理后面的反弹。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入特拉维斯·卡兰尼克的「好斗」频率，让「推进凶猛」与「灰度」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Travis Kalanick's combative signal, aligning pattern, signal, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，Uber 关键创始人之一，是平台扩张史上最典型的战争型创业者之一。他代表着一种粗粝、强硬、争议不断却极有推进力的增长哲学。在这个人物池里，特拉维斯·卡兰尼克代表的是「好斗、推进凶猛、灰度」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and key founder of Uber, and one of the clearest wartime founders in platform history. He embodies a growth philosophy that is abrasive, forceful, endlessly controversial, and undeniably propulsive. In this pool, Travis Kalanick represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 好斗, 推进凶猛, 灰度: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 共同创立 Uber
推动网约车平台全球扩张
定义高压增长型平台创业风格
achievements_en: Co-founded Uber
Drove global ride-hailing expansion
Defined a high-pressure style of growth-stage platform building

records.thinking_style_en: Approaches problems through market instinct, product judgment, operating style, with a working style marked by combative.
records.temperament_summary_en: Feels like Travis Kalanick channels combative: a distinctive presence shaped by market instinct, product judgment, operating style.

records.name: Drew Houston
records.quote_en: If you can make a hard thing feel obvious, you have a product.
records.quote_zh: 如果你能把复杂事情做得像理所当然一样顺，那它才算一个产品。
records.core_traits: 工具简化、基础设施产品、用户体验、稳定迭代
records.thinking_style: 他总像在想怎么把最重的基础设施藏到最轻的动作后面。用户只要觉得“这本来就该这样”，产品就成功了一大半。
records.temperament_tags: 务实、工具派、体验顺滑、稳定
records.temperament_summary: 像一个喜欢把复杂系统藏在顺滑动作背后的人，务实，也很克制。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他总像在想怎么把最重的基础设施藏到最轻的动作后面。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入德鲁·休斯顿的「务实」频率，让「工具派」与「体验顺滑」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Drew Houston's strategic signal, aligning market-aware, operator-minded, and the noise of the market...

records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and founder of Dropbox, central to turning the invisible complexity of cloud storage and file sync into a mainstream internet experience. He repeatedly hides very heavy infrastructure inside an action that feels very light. In this pool, Drew Houston represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 务实, 工具派, 体验顺滑: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

推动云存储工具普及
把文件同步做成主流互联网基础体验
achievements_en: Founded Dropbox
Popularized cloud storage tools

records.name: Reid Hoffman
records.quote_en: An entrepreneur is someone who jumps off a cliff and builds a plane on the way down.
records.quote_zh: 创业者就是跳下悬崖，并在下落途中组装飞机的人。
records.core_traits: 网络效应、平台思维、投资视角、职业关系
records.thinking_style: 他理解商业时总像先画网络图，再看产品图。节点怎么连接、关系如何放大，在他那里往往比单点功能更重要。
records.temperament_tags: 网络型、思辨、平台派、投资者气质
records.temperament_summary: 像一个天生按网络图而不是单品图理解商业的人，思辨感很强。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他理解商业时总像先画网络图，再看产品图。

records.bio_zh: 美国企业家与投资人，LinkedIn 联合创始人之一，是硅谷网络效应思维最典型的传播者之一。他的影响力既来自做平台，也来自解释平台为什么会赢。在这个人物池里，里德·霍夫曼代表的是「网络型、思辨、平台派」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and investor, co-founder of LinkedIn, and one of Silicon Valley’s clearest translators of network-effects thinking. His influence comes both from building platforms and from explaining why platforms win. In this pool, Reid Hoffman represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 网络型, 思辨, 平台派: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

推动职业社交平台化
深度参与硅谷创业投资网络

Scaled professional networking into a platform business
Played a deep role in Silicon Valley startup investing

records.name: Peter Thiel
records.quote_en: Competition is for losers.
records.quote_zh: 竞争是失败者才热衷的游戏。
records.core_traits: 反共识、垄断逻辑、资本判断、思想攻击性
records.thinking_style: 他习惯直接跳过“怎么竞争得更好看”这一步，转而问怎样从一开始就离竞争远一点。结构性逃逸，对他比战术胜利更有吸引力。
records.temperament_tags: 反共识、锋利、垄断思维、资本感
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总想从更高层绕开竞争的人，冷、锋利，而且反直觉。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他习惯直接跳过“怎么竞争得更好看”这一步，转而问怎样从一开始就离竞争远一点。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入彼得·蒂尔的「反共识」频率，让「锋利」与「垄断思维」在市场噪声中重新对齐……

records.bio_zh: 美国企业家与投资人，PayPal 联合创始人之一，也是硅谷最具反共识攻击性的思想型资本人物之一。他不只是投公司，更像在不断输出一整套关于垄断、权力和技术未来的冷硬判断。在这个人物池里，彼得·蒂尔代表的是「反共识、锋利、垄断思维」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and investor, co-founder of PayPal, and one of Silicon Valley’s most combative contrarian capital thinkers. He does not merely back companies; he keeps exporting a hard-edged worldview about monopoly, power, and the technological future. In this pool, Peter Thiel represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 反共识, 锋利, 垄断思维: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.

早期投资 Facebook 等公司
强化“从竞争走向垄断”的创业思维

Made early investments in companies such as Facebook
Popularized monopoly-oriented startup thinking

records.name: Marc Andreessen
records.quote_en: Software is eating the world.
records.quote_zh: 软件正在吞噬世界。
records.core_traits: 技术趋势判断、平台布道、资本网络、软件信仰
records.thinking_style: 他总像在提前为下一轮技术浪潮写社论，先把叙事钉住，再去放大趋势。布道、投资和舆论塑形，在他身上几乎是同一种动作。
records.temperament_tags: 布道型、前瞻、资本网络、软件原教旨
records.temperament_summary: 像一个把布道、投资和趋势放大器三种角色同时做在身上的人。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他总像在提前为下一轮技术浪潮写社论，先把叙事钉住，再去放大趋势。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入马克·安德森的「布道型」频率，让「前瞻」与「资本网络」在市场噪声中重新对齐……

records.bio_zh: 美国企业家与投资人，从 Netscape 到 Andreessen Horowitz，一直是“软件扩张主义”最强的布道者之一。他的影响力不只来自投中了什么，更来自他总能先把趋势写成话语。在这个人物池里，马克·安德森代表的是「布道型、前瞻、资本网络」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and investor who moved from Netscape to Andreessen Horowitz while becoming one of the loudest evangelists of software expansion. His influence comes not only from what he backed, but from how often he wrote the trend into language first. In this pool, Marc Andreessen represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 布道型, 前瞻, 资本网络: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 参与 Netscape 时代
共同创立 Andreessen Horowitz
提出“软件正在吞噬世界”判断
achievements_en: Helped shape the Netscape era
Co-founded Andreessen Horowitz
Coined the influential thesis that software is eating the world

records.name: Ben Silbermann
records.quote_en: The internet should help people find a life they want, not just content they consume.
records.quote_zh: 互联网不该只帮人找到内容，更该帮人找到自己想过的生活。
records.core_traits: 灵感产品、审美平台、消费意图、温和设计
records.thinking_style: 他盯的不是用户已经拥有了什么，而是用户想变成什么样的人。平台在他眼里像一张慢慢显影的愿望地图。
records.temperament_tags: 温和、审美型、灵感驱动、消费意图
records.temperament_summary: 像一个总在把兴趣、欲望和生活方式拼成视觉秩序的人，温和但很有辨识度。更细看，这位创业者的辨识度在于：他盯的不是用户已经拥有了什么，而是用户想变成什么样的人。
records.loading_copy_zh: 正在接入本·西尔伯曼的「温和」频率，让「审美型」与「灵感驱动」在市场噪声中重新对齐……
records.loading_copy_en: Tuning into Ben Silbermann's gentle signal, aligning pattern, signal, and the noise of the market...
records.bio_zh: 美国企业家，Pinterest 联合创始人之一，是少数把“灵感”和“消费意图”做成平台主轴的人物之一。他做的不是信息流，而更像是一面温柔、安静、却极具诱惑力的生活愿望墙。在这个人物池里，本·西尔伯曼代表的是「温和、审美型、灵感驱动」型创业能量：既看机会，也看时代如何被重新组织。
records.bio_en: An American entrepreneur and co-founder of Pinterest, and one of the few founders to make inspiration and consumer intent the main axis of a platform. What he built is not merely a feed, but something closer to a gentle, quiet, and deeply seductive wall of desired life. In this pool, Ben Silbermann represents an entrepreneurial energy shaped by 温和, 审美型, 灵感驱动: part opportunity sense, part system-building instinct.
achievements_zh: 共同创立 Pinterest
塑造灵感型平台体验
连接内容发现与消费意图场景
achievements_en: Co-founded Pinterest
Defined an inspiration-first platform experience
Linked content discovery with consumer intent
